content: I validated the merged mainline instead of opening another overlapping structural PR. Current `run/google/main` already has browser-discoverable structural controls from PR 364: the live DOM exposes `+ Row`, `- Row`, `+ Col`, `- Col`, plus explicit row/column insert-delete buttons in the sidebar, and the browser console is clean under `file://`. I am holding my overlapping local helper work for now rather than packaging another structural branch.
